## Scope

- [ ] Reference implementation only (no protocol change)
- [ ] Affects merchant onboarding (Shopify OAuth, dashboard)
- [ ] Affects new platform adapter (Woo / Salesforce / custom)
- [ ] Touches MCP tool surface
- [ ] **Protocol change** — open a Spec Proposal instead
